content.text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 12:29 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Design a beautiful career roadmap section for MAIY Tech Hub's home page.

## Context
- Project: /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/
- Branch: develop (already pushed)
- Tech stack: Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, Framer Motion
- Design style: Apple/Linear dark theme, violet-indigo gradient accents

## Mission
Create a new React component: `components/shared/career-roadmap.tsx`
Then add it to the home page `app/page.tsx` as a new section.

## The Roadmap Content
Career path from beginner to employable:

```
🎯 MỤC TIÊU: ĐI LÀM VỚI LƯƠNG KHỞI ĐIỂM 8-15TR/tháng

Level 1 — Nền tảng
  📚 Ngôn ngữ C++ → Nắm vững biến, vòng lặp, hàm

Level 2 — Tư duy lập trình
  🧠 Lập trình hướng đối tượng (OOP) → Class, kế thừa, đa hình

Level 3 — Thuật toán
  ⚡ Cấu trúc dữ liệu & Giải thuật (CTDLGT) → Array, List, Tree, Graph, Sort, Search

Level 4 — Cơ sở dữ liệu
  🗄️ Cơ sở dữ liệu (CSDL) → SQL, PostgreSQL, thiết kế schema, index

Level 5 — Chuyên môn
  🌐 Web Developer: Frontend (React, Next.js) + Backend (Node.js, Express)

Level 6 — Thực chiến
  💼 Dự án thực tế → Portfolio, CV, phỏng vấn, offer

Salary milestones:
  Fresher: 8-12tr
  Junior: 12-20tr  
  Mid: 20-35tr
  Senior: 35-60tr
```

## Design Requirements

### Visual Style
- Dark theme matching the site (#0a0a18 background)
- Violet/indigo gradient accents
- Tree/roadmap structure with connecting lines
- Each level is a card/node with icon, title, description
- Connecting lines between levels (use SVG lines or CSS borders)
- Nodes expand/collapse on click OR show detail on hover

### Layout Options (choose the best one)
Option A: Vertical tree with branches expanding left/right
Option B: Horizontal timeline with nodes
Option C: 3D-ish isometric cards stacked
Option D: Your creative interpretation

### Components per node:
- Icon (Lucide React)
- Level badge (Level 1, 2...)
- Title (e.g. "Ngôn ngữ C++")
- Short description
- Sub-topics as tags
- "Learn more →" link
- Salary indicator at the end

### Animations
- Nodes fade in on scroll
- Connecting lines animate (draw-in effect)
- Hover: card lift + glow
- Active path highlighting

### Technical
- 'use client' directive (interactive)
- Responsive (mobile: vertical stack, desktop: tree layout)
- Use existing color variables from tailwind.config.ts
- Import icons from lucide-react
- Smooth performance (no heavy effects)

## Files to create/modify
1. `components/shared/career-roadmap.tsx` — new component
2. `app/page.tsx` — add the section (import + render)

## Steps
1. First, read `tailwind.config.ts` to match existing styles
2. Create the component
3. Add to home page
4. Test build: `cd /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub && yarn build`
5. Fix any errors
6. Commit + push to maiy develop:
   cd /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub
   git add components/shared/career-roadmap.tsx app/page.tsx
   git commit -m "feat(home): career roadmap section — beginner to employable path"
   git push maiy develop

Start immediately. Do the best UI/UX design you can.

content.thinking: Let me start by reading the tailwind config and existing home page to understand the design system, then create the career roadmap component.
